introSection: Pteranodon Flyers is a Setpoint suspended roller coaster located at Universal Islands of Adventure in Orlando, Florida, USA. It opened with the park on May 28, 1999 and is part of the Camp Jurassic subsection of the Jurassic Park themed area. A similar ride named Canopy Flyer exists at Universal Studios Singapore.
fullText:
Pteranodon Flyers is a Setpoint suspended roller coaster located at Universal Islands of Adventure in Orlando, Florida, USA. It opened with the park on May 28, 1999 and is part of the Camp Jurassic subsection of the Jurassic Park themed area. A similar ride named Canopy Flyer exists at Universal Studios Singapore.



Orange track and grey supports.
